title: Department Manager Vacancy at Walmart India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Walmart India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Walmart India in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India:
Walmart India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India!
